parameters.script:
import json
import datetime

try:
    data = json.loads(flow_file.content.decode())
    now = datetime.datetime.now()
    
    report = f"""📊 RÉSUMÉ QUOTIDIEN CRYPTO
{'='*50}

📅 Date: {now.strftime('%d/%m/%Y')}
⏰ Heure: {now.strftime('%H:%M')} CET

{'─'*50}
💰 COURS ACTUELS (en EUR)
{'─'*50}

"""
    
    for coin in data:
        symbol = coin['symbol'].upper()
        name = coin['name']
        price = coin['current_price']
        change = coin.get('price_change_percentage_24h', 0)
        
        if change >= 0:
            change_str = f"+{change:.2f}% 📈"
        else:
            change_str = f"{change:.2f}% 📉"
        
        report += f"{symbol} {name}\n"
        report += f"   💶 Prix: €{price:,.2f}\n"
        report += f"   {change_str}\n\n"
    
    report += f"{'═'*50}\nℹ️ Données: CoinGecko API\n📧 Généré à {now.strftime('%H:%M')} CET\n{'═'*50}\n"
    
    flow_file.content = report.encode('utf-8')
    flow_file.attributes['report'] = report
    print('Report generated successfully')
    
except Exception as e:
    flow_file.content = f'Erreur: {str(e)}'.encode('utf-8')
    print(f'Error: {e}')
